rows.label: qev055403_MSG0001
rows.name:
How are things? Is the search for
Senirapa Water proceeding smoothly?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055403_MSG0002
rows.name:
We are learning all sorts of things
about the Orphe from Kon'eibu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055403_MSG0003
rows.name:
...It is quite a mysterious feeling,
though. It's as if I already knew
everything being taught,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055403_MSG0004
rows.name:
and I am simply recalling it piece
by piece. Is this what it means to
be Orphe... Is this the Ovah?[ST:wait ]
